artifact.source:
root = Card([table], "Benchmark Results", "50 rows from data/results.csv")
data = Query("read_csv", {path: "./data/results.csv"}, {rows: [], columns: []})
table = DataTable("Benchmark Results", data.columns, data.rows, true)
